title: senecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii
intro: Senecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii, also known as Cotton Bush, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
